item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: Beavertail Day is Coming to STA! Starting Wednesday, March 3rd, Mme Bourdon will be selling tickets for a delicious treat you won’t want to miss! On Tuesday, March 10th, the Bytown Beavertails mobile truck will be rolling into STA during both lunch periods to serve up warm, sweet goodness! Classic Beavertails are $10 each, made fresh and served at lunch. Today is the last day to purchase your beavertail. Don’t miss your chance to enjoy this tasty winter treat

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron:
item.description: A reminder that today is the final day to place a Charcuterie Board order in time for Easter Celebrations. Please see Mme Perron for more information

item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: There will be a debate team meeting Tuesday at 10:35 in Rm.209

item.title: A message from Ms. Dawson:
item.description: There will be a Dungeons and Dragons Club starting for Grades 7&8. Beginners and experienced players are all welcome. Beginners are invited to stop by room 142 at the beginning of lunch recess today and next Friday, March 13 to build character sheets. Campaigns for beginners and experienced players will start after March Break.

item.title: A message from Mr. Warner:
item.description: Congratulations to our 7&8 Girls' Basketball Team on starting their season with two wins yesterday over ST. FX and RHS. The girls played really hard from start to finish and used their experience and athleticism to take control of both games from the beginning. Very proud of you girls - you did everything that we asked of you. Please congratulate them STA - they represented! The team travels to Kemptville next Wednesday to take on St. Mikes in a final exhibition game before March break!

item.title: A message from Ms. Brennan:
item.description: Reminder that Room 201 is open today at lunch for the high school Dungeons & Dragons Club! If you’re running a campaign, looking to join one, or just want to meet other fantasy fans, stop by and roll some dice.
